trans-unit.source: Generate deployment artifacts for an AppHost
trans-unit.target: Génère des artefacts de déploiement pour un Aspire AppHost. (Préversion)

trans-unit.source: Generating artifacts...
trans-unit.target: Génération d’artefacts...

trans-unit.source: Loading...
trans-unit.target: Chargement en cours… Merci de patienter.

trans-unit.source: Do not build or restore the project before running
trans-unit.target: Do not build or restore the project before running

trans-unit.source: PUBLISHING COMPLETED
trans-unit.target: PUBLICATION EFFECTUÉE

trans-unit.source: PUBLISHING FAILED
trans-unit.target: ÉCHEC DE LA PUBLICATION

trans-unit.source: The output path for the generated artifacts. Defaults to the AppHost directory's 'aspire-output' folder if not specified.
trans-unit.target: Le chemin de sortie des artefacts générés. Par défaut, il est « ./aspire-output » si aucun chemin n’est spécifié.

trans-unit.source: The path to the Aspire AppHost project file or a directory to search
trans-unit.target: Chemin d’accès au fichier projet AppHost Aspire.

trans-unit.source: Select a publisher:
trans-unit.target: Sélectionnez un éditeur :

trans-unit.source: Published output verification failed.
trans-unit.target: Published output verification failed.

trans-unit.source: Published output is up to date.
trans-unit.target: Published output is up to date.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost output plan reported a different AppHost directory.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost output plan reported a different AppHost directory.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost project directory could not be resolved.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost project directory could not be resolved.

trans-unit.source: A publish destination escapes the Git repository through a symbolic link or junction.
trans-unit.target: A publish destination escapes the Git repository through a symbolic link or junction.

trans-unit.source: All publish destinations must be inside the AppHost Git repository.
trans-unit.target: All publish destinations must be inside the AppHost Git repository.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost output plan contains duplicate output identities.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost output plan contains duplicate output identities.

trans-unit.source: The final AppHost output state was not available for reconciliation.
trans-unit.target: The final AppHost output state was not available for reconciliation.

trans-unit.source: Git could not evaluate the files included in the publish destinations.
trans-unit.target: Git could not evaluate the files included in the publish destinations.

trans-unit.source: Publish verification requires the AppHost to be inside an available Git repository.
trans-unit.target: Publish verification requires the AppHost to be inside an available Git repository.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost does not support publish verification. Update the AppHost to a newer version of Aspire.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost does not support publish verification. Update the AppHost to a newer version of Aspire.

trans-unit.source: A publish destination path could not be resolved safely.
trans-unit.target: A publish destination path could not be resolved safely.

trans-unit.source: Publish verification does not support symbolic links or junctions inside output trees.
trans-unit.target: Publish verification does not support symbolic links or junctions inside output trees.

trans-unit.source: The --verify and --list-steps options cannot be used together.
trans-unit.target: The --verify and --list-steps options cannot be used together.

trans-unit.source: Missing files in '{0}':
trans-unit.target: Missing files in '{0}':

trans-unit.source: Publish destinations cannot contain or be inside nested Git repositories or submodules.
trans-unit.target: Publish destinations cannot contain or be inside nested Git repositories or submodules.

trans-unit.source: Verify generated artifacts match the Git-included output without modifying it
trans-unit.target: Verify generated artifacts match the Git-included output without modifying it

trans-unit.source: Orphaned files in '{0}':
trans-unit.target: Orphaned files in '{0}':

trans-unit.source: Published output changed after the AppHost reported completion.
trans-unit.target: Published output changed after the AppHost reported completion.

trans-unit.source: A publish output path does not match its declared file or directory kind.
trans-unit.target: A publish output path does not match its declared file or directory kind.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost output plan changed after execution was authorized.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost output plan changed after execution was authorized.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost output plan contains overlapping destinations or staging paths.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost output plan contains overlapping destinations or staging paths.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost output plan does not contain the expected staged primary output.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost output plan does not contain the expected staged primary output.

trans-unit.source: Regenerate with: {0}
trans-unit.target: Regenerate with: {0}

trans-unit.source: The temporary publish verification directory could not be removed.
trans-unit.target: The temporary publish verification directory could not be removed.

trans-unit.source: Stale files in '{0}':
trans-unit.target: Stale files in '{0}':

trans-unit.source: The AppHost reported an unexpected output-plan state: {0}.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost reported an unexpected output-plan state: {0}.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost reported an unsupported output kind: {0}.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost reported an unsupported output kind: {0}.

trans-unit.source: These selected pipeline steps do not support output relocation: {0}.
trans-unit.target: These selected pipeline steps do not support output relocation: {0}.

trans-unit.source: The AppHost output plan contains a writable path outside the verification staging directory.
trans-unit.target: The AppHost output plan contains a writable path outside the verification staging directory.
